name: Beetroot

pros.title: practical staple carb source
pros.explanation: Tubers are often judged by how usable they are day to day.

pros.title: whole-food carb package
pros.explanation: That matters because it is a cleaner baseline than heavily refined carbs.

pros.title: can be quite filling
pros.explanation: A useful practical strength when the preparation stays sensible.

cons.title: still a carb-heavy category
cons.explanation: That is the core ceiling tubers have to manage.

cons.title: preparation changes outcomes a lot
cons.explanation: What you do to a tuber can make or break it.

cons.title: protein support is weak
cons.explanation: Tubers still need help from the rest of the meal.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
